zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger I de Somerville於大約1108年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾維其諾時，他的父親Gaulter Somerville39歲，母親Cecily de Lunsie15歲。他和Edelina le Boteler至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1190年在英國斯塔福爾維其諾享年83歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Somerville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Graveron-Sémerville in Eure (Normandy), from the ancient Germanic personal name Sigimar (see Siemer ) + Old French ville ‘settlement’. The surname was taken to Scotland in the 12th century by William de Somerville, a retainer of David, Earl of Huntingdon, who became King David I of Scotland.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Somacháin (see Summers ) or Mag Shamradháin (see Somers ).

variants.name: Siemer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Helmuth, Otto, Theresia.
German: from the ancient Germanic personal name Siegmar, composed of the elements sigi ‘victory’ + mari, meri ‘famous’.

variants.name: Summerville
meanings: English, Scottish (Lanarkshire), and Irish: variant of   Somerville  . This form of the surname is particularly common in Ireland.

variants.name: Simrell
meanings: Scottish: perhaps related to the Ulster nameSumeril, a variant of Somerville .

variants.name: Summerfield
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called with Old English sumor ‘summer’ + feld ‘field, open land’, denoting summer pasture or fields cultivated only in summer, such as Summerfield in Woodnesborough (Kent), Somerfield Court in Sellindge (Kent), and Summerfield in Marlborough (Wiltshire).
Americanized form (translation into English) of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Sommerfeld  , a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger I de Somerville was born about 1108, in Wichnor, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Gaulter Somerville, was 39 and his mother, Cecily de Lunsie, was 15. He had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Edelina le Boteler. He died in 1190, in Wichnor, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 83.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger I de Somerville est né environ 1108, à Wichnor, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gaulter Somerville, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Cecily de Lunsie, avait 15 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Edelina le Boteler. Il est décédé en 1190, à Wichnor, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 83 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger I de Somerville um 1108 in Wichnor, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gaulter Somerville 39 und seine Mutter Cecily de Lunsie 15. Er hatte mit Edelina le Boteler mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1190 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Wichnor, Staffordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger I de Somerville è nato il circa 1108 nel Wichnor, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Gaulter Somerville, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Cecily de Lunsie, aveva 15 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con Edelina le Boteler. Morì nel 1190, nel Wichnor, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 83 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Roger I de Somerville(이)가 대략 1108년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 위ch너에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gaulter Somerville(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecily de Lunsie(은)는 15세였다. 그는 Edelina le Boteler(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1190년 영국 스태퍼드실르 위ch너에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger I de Somerville родился около 1108 г. в местности вичнор, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gaulter Somerville было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecily de Lunsie, 15.
